verse.name: V1
verse.lines: In and out of situations, That tug-of-war at me All day long I struggle For answers that I need But then I come into His presence, All my questions become clear And for that sacred moment, No doubt can interfere

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: In the presence of Jehovah, God almighty, Prince of Peace Troubles vanish, hearts are mended, In the presence of the King

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: Through His love the Lord provided, A place for us to rest A place to find the answer, In the hour of distress Now there's never any reason, For you to give up in despair Just slip away and breathe His name, He will surely meet you there
